veg.name: Standard Veg Thali
veg.description: Perfect everyday meal featuring Basmati Rice, 4 fresh whole-wheat Chapatis, comforting Yellow Dal Fry, a dry seasonal Vegetable fry, fresh green salad, and sweet home pickle.

veg.name: Premium Paneer Thali
veg.description: A richer vegetarian option including Kadai Paneer or Paneer Butter Masala, aromatic Jeera Rice, 4 butter-brushed Chapatis, Dal Makhani, Raita, Salad, Papad, and a sweet Gulab Jamun.

veg.name: Dehati Dal Bhaat Chokha
veg.description: The ultimate comfort food of Jharkhand. Traditional Arhar Dal, steamed Arwa Rice, roasted Potato Chokha with mustard oil and green chilies, papad, and fresh mint chutney.

non_veg.name: Dehati Chicken Curry Thali
non_veg.description: Ranchi style slow-cooked spicy chicken curry (3 pieces) made with authentic local spices, served with fresh Basmati Rice or 4 Chapatis, light Dal, salad, and pickle.

non_veg.name: Egg Curry Thali
non_veg.description: Delicious pan-fried boiled eggs (2 pieces) simmered in a rich tomato-onion gravy, served alongside steamed Basmati Rice, 4 wheat rotis, dal, and green salad.

non_veg.name: Ranchi Fish Curry Thali
non_veg.description: Fresh mustard-paste style Rohu fish curry (2 pieces) prepared in traditional style, served with hot steamed rice, lemon slice, sliced onions, and papad.
